description: Auto-run drift audit after any saveEndpoint mutation detected in the session. Read-only — never deploys, never mutates. Flags template/worker drift.

PostToolUse.run: echo '[runpod-post-deploy-audit] saveEndpoint detected. If scripts/serverless/audit_digest.py exists in the current repo, run it against the target endpoint now with: python scripts/serverless/audit_digest.py --endpoint-id <ID> --manifest release/<env>-deploy-*.json' 1>&2
notes: This hook is advisory only — it prints a reminder to stderr after any Bash invocation that mentions saveEndpoint.
It does NOT execute audit_digest.py automatically because the endpoint ID and manifest path are context-specific; forcing an auto-run would either fail or run against the wrong target.
To make this a real auto-runner, the user can edit this file to replace the `run` field with an inline script that parses the saveEndpoint command's arguments for the endpoint ID.
To disable this hook, set `enabled` to false, or delete this file.

SessionStart.run: echo '[runpod-post-deploy-audit hook loaded] saveEndpoint mutations will trigger a drift-audit reminder.' 1>&2
